compiled_state.title: Add TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW constant to figma-tags.conf and update tag constants test
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Add TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW=design:awaiting_review to plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf and update the tag constants test to cover it.

## Why
FP-PRECOND-1 integration test must reference a canonical tag constant for the 'design:awaiting_review' tag. The tag is referenced in the story's sync precondition done definition but no constant exists in figma-tags.conf, which currently only defines TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT and TAG_APPROVED.

## testing_mode: UPDATE
Modifying existing source and test files.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf — add TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW=design:awaiting_review
- tests/skills/test-figma-tag-constants.sh — add assertion for TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW=design:awaiting_review present in figma-tags.conf
  Verify: grep -q 'TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW=design:awaiting_review' plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf
- [ ] tests/skills/test-figma-tag-constants.sh asserts TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW is sourced and equals 'design:awaiting_review'
  Verify: grep -q 'TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW' tests/skills/test-figma-tag-constants.sh
- [ ] bash tests/skills/test-figma-tag-constants.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-figma-tag-constants.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
